name: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 175,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points after spending $6,000 on eligible purchases within the first 6 months of card membership. Offer ends 4/15/26.

earning_rates.notes: Hilton Honors Bonus Points per dollar at hotels and resorts within the Hilton portfolio
Flights booked directly with the airline or through Amex Travel
U.S. restaurants, including takeout and delivery
Car rentals booked directly with select car rental companies

annual_credits.name: Hilton Resort Credit
annual_credits.description: $250 statement credit each calendar year for charges at participating Hilton Resorts

annual_credits.name: Airline Fee Credit
annual_credits.description: $250 airline fee credit per calendar year for incidental charges (baggage, seat selection) on a selected airline

annual_credits.name: Free Night Award
annual_credits.description: One Free Night Award each year after card renewal (valid at properties up to 150,000 points)

annual_credits.name: Second Free Night
annual_credits.description: Second Free Night Award after spending $60,000 on eligible purchases in a calendar year

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as card is open

other_benefits: Priority Pass Select lounge access (enrollment required)
Fifth Night Free on reward stays
National Car Rental Emerald Club Executive status
